creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
In-page anchoring
=================

Some anchors are misplaced, for example: 

1. <https://www.freebsd.org/usergroups/#yahoo-club>

2. scroll up a little to reveal the required link


Outdated or dead references
===========================

<http://groups.yahoo.com/group/pbclinux>
<http://groups.yahoo.com/neo/groups/bsdusersoflosangeles/info>

* pages such as these redirect to Yahoo's home page

* IIRC the Yahoo Groups service ceased some time ago. 

<http://www.bsdserbia.org/>

* can not be reached, maybe no longer exists.

----

… and so on, if you like I can go through the page in detail.
